summary: Retest of scroll-lock fix (iteration 4) after main agent moved scrollY capture into the openProduct click handler via savedScrollRef. ALL scroll-preservation assertions now pass on both desktop and mobile. Backdrop, modal interactions, Add to Shelf, My shelf nav and empty state all verified. The iteration 3 timing bug is fully resolved.
passed_assertions: DESKTOP 1280x800: pre-click scrollY=1500 → body.position=fixed, body.top=-1500px (matches savedScrollRef captured in click handler before setActiveId)
DESKTOP product-next click: body.top remains pinned at -1500px (effect dependency on !!activeId prevents re-capture/unlock during prev/next switches)
DESKTOP close-detail click: window.scrollY restored EXACTLY to 1500 (pre-click position)
DESKTOP modal-backdrop: zIndex=99 (above header z=70), position=fixed, rect=(0,0,1280,800) covers entire viewport
DESKTOP backdrop edge click (5,5) closes modal — product-detail removed from DOM
MOBILE close-detail-mobile click: window.scrollY restored EXACTLY to 600
FUNCTIONAL: btn-interested-desktop text 'Add to Shelf · 3' before click → 'On your shelf · 4' after click (likes increment + state toggle)
FUNCTIONAL: My shelf nav label present in header with href=/my-shelf
FUNCTIONAL: /my-shelf empty state renders [data-testid=myshelf-empty] with 1 SVG illustration; [data-testid=myshelf-cta] href=/#archive, text 'Add to Shelf'

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Iteration 3 issue (savedY captured inside useEffect AFTER Radix auto-scroll) was fixed by capturing window.scrollY in openProduct click handler into savedScrollRef.current BEFORE setActiveId, then reading from the ref inside the useEffect.
rca_of_the_issue.verification: App.js:55-59 introduces savedScrollRef + openProduct callback. App.js:69 reads savedScrollRef.current. Live test confirms body.top=-{preY}px and post-close scrollY === preY for both 1500 (desktop) and 600 (mobile).

action_items: Pre-existing minor (unchanged from iteration 2/3): React console warning 'Invalid DOM property fetchpriority (should be fetchPriority)' from an — not blocking but should be fixed.
critical_code_review_comments: App.js:55-91 — Fix is correct and minimal. savedScrollRef pattern decouples capture timing from React commit/effect timing.

Header.jsx still toggles document.body.style.overflow='hidden' for mobile menu; combined with body.position:fixed lock from App.js this could double-mutate body styles if both open simultaneously. Consider centralising body-lock into a single hook (low priority — no observed regression).
Pre-existing: typo causes React warning in console (should be fetchPriority).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Scroll-lock fix verified end-to-end. Desktop preY=1500 → body.top=-1500px → close → scrollY=1500. Mobile preY=600 → body.top=-600px → close → scrollY=600. Backdrop z=99 covers full viewport including header (z=70) and edge-clicks close modal. My shelf empty state + CTA href=/#archive works after localStorage clear. Only outstanding minor is the fetchpriority React warning.
